spec.name: In The Forest
spec.description: The magical energy barrier runs straight north-south, unaffected by dips in the grounds, intervening rocks and trees, everything. From the north, you hear a faint rushing noise above the humming of the field. The trail you are on continues to the north and south, only a few feet away from the barrier it follows.

extra_descs.description: You can faintly see the woods continue beyond it, but it seems there's no way through. The field rises high up into the air, and seems to form a ceiling above the woods, preventing a flying entrance. You'd also bet it extends deep into the ground.
